productDisplayName: Nike Men Green Dunk High Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteDesigned for superior performance and comfort, the nike Dunk High has a high heel counter to provide ample structural support to the ankle, protecting it from sprains and injuries when running. Coupled with an uber cool styling, this shoe has a superior traction feature that makes the Nike Dunk High a huge favourite both on the track and off it.Product DetailsPerforated toe uppers for added dry, breathable comfortHigh profile design provides ankle supportHigh ankle cup for added support and snug Fit to the back-foot and anklePadded tongue and sock-liner for snug fit and added protection from shockLace-up system for snug fitFull length EVA mid-sole for added cushioning and impact protectionFlexible multi-directional rubber out-sole with a full cup-sole stitch for durabilitySemi-circular grooved forefoot with pivot point for easy 180° rotation of the foot without causing injuryMaterial and CareSynthetic leatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
